generated_oml:
instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor generating raw point‑cloud data at ~10 Hz from the vehicle’s onboard suite."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle ECUs output speed, position, and orientation telemetry for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance PathPlannerComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Path planner producing projected driving path telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ProjectedPathDataTransmitted
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Software component performing spatial clustering and trajectory estimation on LiDAR data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
]

instance RawPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProjectedPathDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PathPlannerComponent
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware mediates all sensor and actuator communication."
]

instance WiFiLinkLowLatency : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low‑latency Wi‑Fi link providing sub‑tenth‑second round‑trip communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataTranslationISO23247FE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature extractor implementing ISO 23247 to serialize, type‑align, and unit‑convert telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature extractor FE implemented as a ROS 2 package that processes raw LiDAR point‑cloud data."
]

instance CloudComputeACCNode : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud‑based compute node hosting Adaptive Cruise Control algorithm for off‑loading."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature extractor FE responsible for lead‑vehicle detection and desired‑speed calculation in the cloud."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 node handling on‑demand ACC control commands from the UI."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance RawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point‑cloud data captured at ~10 Hz."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed, position, and orientation telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationISO23247FE, ACCComputationOffloadFE
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path trajectory information streamed from the path planner."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedPathDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationISO23247FE
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Co‑registered object tracks derived from LiDAR clustering and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE, ACCComputationOffloadFE
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the live vehicle speed, position, and orientation streamed by the twin."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into co‑registered object tracks derived from LiDAR."
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the projected driving path generated by the path planner."
]

instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the cloud‑computed desired speed decision for ACC."
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI streams real‑time vehicle state, projected path, and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, ProjectedPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC decision logic to cloud compute, returning desired speed."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "On‑demand control of ACC via UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to enable ACC from operator UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to disable ACC from operator UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed command for ACC during manual override."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command initiated by operator or safety logic."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateTroubleshootingReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate post‑mission troubleshooting report."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LowerChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower‑level chassis forming the vehicle’s mechanical base."
]

instance UpperChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper‑level chassis housing antennas and additional sensors."
]

instance SensorSuiteComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Bundle of sensors including LiDAR, cameras, and IMU."
]

instance VehicleECUComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Embedded Control Unit running vehicle‑on‑board ACC logic."
]

instance ActuatorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actuator module driving steering, throttle, and braking."
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LowerChassis, UpperChassis, SensorSuiteComponent, VehicleECUComponent, ActuatorComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    // Environment defined without components to avoid type conflicts
]

instance operator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Operator user."
]

instance developer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Developer user."
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains operator, developer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for steering and motor actuation are generated by the 'Steering Servo Actuation FE' and 'Motor Actuation FE'. Prior to transmission, the ISO 23247 'Data Translation FE' serializes these commands, aligns message formats, and performs necessary unit conversions. The formatted commands are sent over the ROS 2 network to the actuator controllers on the physical twin. Execution feedback is received via vehicle state telemetry and sensor data, which is re‑ingested into the 'Data Pre‑Processing FE' to confirm command completion and close the control loop. The document describes no explicit authentication, conflict‑resolution, or confirmation mechanisms beyond this feedback process."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates with a strict intra‑domain clock synchronisation target of 100 ms, mandated by safety‑critical vehicular standards and enforced during computation off‑loading phases. This 100‑ms accuracy is achieved through coordinated time‑keeping across all devices, allowing synchronous data exchange and digital replica updates at that temporal granularity. Latency between physical sensor readings and digital updates is implicitly constrained to remain within this window to preserve real‑time fidelity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The orchestration follows ISO 23247 Reference Architecture, mapping software components to Feature Extractors (FEs) and deploying each FE as an individual ROS2 package. The User Entity encapsulates the User Interface FE split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel components. The Digital Twin Entity houses data management and control services, while the Physical Twin Entity handles data pre‑processing, actuation, and device communication, additionally providing general automotive functions such as point‑cloud clustering and tracking. The components interoperate via ROS2 middleware, with each FE containing one or more ROS2 nodes that publish/subscribe to topic streams reflecting resource‑specific functionality. This entity‑based, distributed deployment ensures coordinated operation across compute, sensor, and actuator resources."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DTS employs a ROS 2 (DDS) network for intra‑software component messaging. Cross‑entity communication between the Physical Twin Entity and the Digital Twin is performed over a Wi‑Fi network using UDP as the transport protocol. The 'Data Translation FE' is responsible for message serialization, type alignment, and unit conversion for all data streams. The document does not provide explicit bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security specifications for the network infrastructure."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliant with ISO 23247 – Digital Twin framework for manufacturing, adopting its reference architecture that specifies a four‑entity structure (Observable Manufacturing Element, Data Collection & Device Control, Digital Twin, User). Implementation may employ OPC Unified Architecture as the communication and data exchange protocol, thereby ensuring interoperability within the manufacturing environment. No additional industry certifications or interoperability frameworks are specified in the document."
]
